title: Keto Buckwheat Crumble Bites
description: A delicious keto dessert made with buckwheat, chewy texture, and a hint of citrusy flavor.
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine buckwheat groats, almond flour, and granulated sweetener.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and lemon zest.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Roll the dough into small balls (about 1 inch in diameter) and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden.
While the bites are baking, melt the butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
Remove the bites from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Dip the top of each bite into the melted butter, then roll in crumble to coat.
Place the bites back on the baking sheet and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to set the crumble.
